strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq aligns directly with required AI agent skills
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-adjacent tooling, Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java exposure appears limited and dated
Cloud breadth is narrow — AWS CDK mentioned, but limited GCP/Azure and Kubernetes specifics

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and limited Kotlin exposure

response.justification: The candidate brings well over the required 6+ years of full-stack engineering, with directly relevant TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS experience, plus current hands-on work on AI agents and MCP tooling that maps neatly to the role's AI requirement. Gaps exist around Nest.js and Kotlin/Java depth, and cloud/Kubernetes coverage is thinner than ideal, but the strong engineering fundamentals, testing rigor, and architectural breadth suggest a solid fit for the position.
